title: sweech failover: 429 detection + auto-rotate to next-ranked profile

context.text: From runecode RUNECODE_NEEDS_v3.md (S2). Closes T-LU-859 root cause. AC: daemon-side 429 detection from response headers; auto-rotates to next-ranked profile by accountScore(); emits webhook + audit log entry; configurable cooldown before retry. Codeuctor v1 depends on this.
